titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muhammad Ibn Hassan
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muhammad Ibn Hassan

segments: ه عن محمّد بن حسّان فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن؛ و الحسين بن أحمد بن إدريس- رضي اللّه عنهم- عن أحمد بن إدريس، عن محمّد بن حسّان‌.
arabic.text: ه عن محمّد بن حسّان فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن؛ و الحسين بن أحمد بن إدريس- رضي اللّه عنهم- عن أحمد بن إدريس، عن محمّد بن حسّان‌.

segments: And whatever is narrated from Muhammad ibn Hassan, I have narrated it from my father, and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan, and from Al-Husayn ibn Ahmad ibn Idris - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Ahmad ibn Idris, from Muhammad ibn Hassan.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: And whatever is narrated from Muhammad ibn Hassan, I have narrated it from my father, and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan, and from Al-Husayn ibn Ahmad ibn Idris - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Ahmad ibn Idris, from Muhammad ibn Hassan.
